General.Name: TomTom NV
General.Description: TomTom N.V., together with its subsidiaries, develops and sells navigation and location-based products and services in Europe, the Americas, Asia, and internationally. The company operates in two segments, Location Technology and Consumer. It offers routing, automotive, and places APIs; automotive navigation, navigation SDK for mobile, and AI agent products; maps for automated driving, map maker, maps SDK for JavaScript, and map display and places APIs. The company also provides traffic solutions, such as traffic stats, origin destination analysis, route monitoring, junction analytics, historical traffic volumes, and traffic APIs; and navigation apps, personal and professional sat navs, in-dash navigation, accessories, and maps and service updates for drivers. In addition, it offers road traffic management, location intelligence, electrification, automated driving, navigation for automotive, and safety and regulations solutions. The company serves fleet management and logistics, mobility on demand, Insurtech, and retail and advertising, as well as government and public sectors. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Amsterdam, the Netherlands.
